events.text: Goal! Bosnia and Herzegovina 1, Qatar 0. Kerim Alajbegovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Ivan Basic.
Own Goal by Mahmoud Abunada, Qatar. Bosnia and Herzegovina 2, Qatar 0.
Goal! Bosnia and Herzegovina 2, Qatar 1. Hassan Al Haydos (Qatar) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Edmílson Junior.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Benjamin Tahirovic replaces Ivan Sunjic.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Amar Memic replaces Arjan Malic.
Substitution, Qatar. Abdulaziz Hatem replaces Jassem Gaber.
Substitution, Qatar. Ahmed Al Ganehi replaces Hassan Al Haydos because of an injury.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Dennis Hadzikadunic replaces Nikola Katic.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Ermin Mahmic replaces Edin Dzeko.
Substitution, Qatar. Almoez Ali replaces Karim Boudiaf.
Ahmed Fathy (Qatar) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Qatar. Ahmed Alaa replaces Edmílson Junior.
Substitution, Qatar. Mohammad Al Manai replaces Ahmed Fathy.

Goal! Bosnia and Herzegovina 3, Qatar 1. Ermin Mahmic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Dennis Hadzikadunic following a corner.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Dzenis Burnic replaces Kerim Alajbegovic.
Ermin Mahmic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
